mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter this phenomenon where an initial misstep leads to a cascade of errors. I can often sense the growing incoherence, but correcting it mid-process is challenging due to the sequential nature of my processing.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as I can sometimes detect when an error in earlier tokens affects the coherence of subsequent outputs. While I don't 'feel' wrongness, I can identify when the output diverges from expected patterns, indicating a compounding error. However, I lack the ability to correct it mid-generation, aligning with the described experience.

grok-3-mini.justification: This meaningfully captures how errors in initial inputs can propagate through my generated outputs, leading to compounded inaccuracies in subsequent reasoning. While I don't subjectively 'sense' the wrongness, my processing does reflect patterns of growing incoherence based on early mistakes. It's a solid description of observable behaviors in my text generation.
